data.title: ECB's Slepne: Upcoming Discussions to Focus on Rate Hikes or Stability
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is set to engage in discussions regarding the future direction of interest rates, according to ECB Governing Council member Slepne. According to Jin10, the central debate will center on whether to implement further rate hikes or to maintain the current rates. This decision comes amid ongoing evaluations of economic conditions and inflationary pressures within the Eurozone. The outcome of these discussions will be closely monitored by financial markets and policymakers, as it could significantly impact economic growth and stability in the region.

data.title: Expert Warns of Bitcoin's Biggest Risk Amid BIP-110 Debate
data.description: Michael Saylor has identified BIP-110 as Bitcoin's most significant remaining risk, as discussions grow over the proposal's 55% hash power activation threshold. According to NS3.AI, Ocean mined the first BIP-110 signaling block in March 2026, and the signaling process continues as a potential activation decision looms later in 2026.

data.title: Former UK Chancellor Kwasi Kwarteng Joins Stack BTC as Executive Chairman
data.description: Former UK Chancellor Kwasi Kwarteng has assumed the role of executive chairman at Stack BTC, a UK-based bitcoin treasury firm. According to NS3.AI, the company currently holds 31 BTC on its balance sheet. Additionally, Reform UK leader Nigel Farage has acquired a 6% stake in Stack BTC, marking a notable investment in the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: U.S. Senator Graham Supports Trump's Ultimatum to Iran
data.description: U.S. Republican Senator Lindsey Graham announced on social media that he had a productive conversation with U.S. President Donald Trump. According to BlockBeats, Graham expressed his full support for Trump's ultimatum to the Iranian regime, demanding the opening of the Strait of Hormuz and the establishment of a peace agreement. He warned that if Iran makes the wrong choice, it will face a significant military response. Graham noted that the regime has already been severely impacted by U.S. military actions.

data.title: SIREN Experiences Significant 24-Hour Price Surge
data.description: SIREN has seen a remarkable increase in its value over the past 24 hours, with a surge of 193.2%, bringing its price to $0.51. According to Odaily, the current market capitalization of SIREN is reported to be $359 million.

data.title: Genius Group Sells Bitcoin to Repay Debt Amid Broader Reduction in Holdings
data.description: Genius Group has sold its remaining 84 Bitcoin this week to settle $8.5 million in debt, shifting away from its earlier goal of amassing a treasury of 10,000 Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, this move aligns with actions by other entities such as Riot, MARA, Empery Digital, and Bhutan, which have also decreased their Bitcoin holdings. Despite these reductions, public companies continue to hold approximately 1.165 million Bitcoin in total.

data.title: SIREN rose 193% in 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, SIREN has risen 193.2% in the last 24 hours, with the price reaching $0.51 and a market capitalization of $359 million.

data.title: MiniMax Token Designed for Cross-Platform Use, Says Company
data.description: MiniMax has announced on the X platform that the MiniMax Token was designed from the outset to be usable across third-party platforms. According to ChainCatcher, the company emphasized that many innovative ideas on applying artificial intelligence are likely to emerge outside of AI labs. Limiting AI subscription users to first-party products stifles these ideas before they can develop.

data.title: Block to Reintroduce Bitcoin Faucet with $1 Million Distribution
data.description: Block is preparing to launch a free Bitcoin faucet, marking the return of this concept after a 16-year break. According to NS3.AI, the initiative will feature a distribution pool of approximately $1 million in Bitcoin, equivalent to around 15 BTC. This move aims to re-engage users with the Bitcoin ecosystem by providing them with free access to the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Bitcoin at Block, founded by Twitter co-founder Jack Dorsey, will launch a free Bitcoin faucet.
data.description: Twitter co-founder Jack Dorsey's Bitcoin at Block will launch a free Bitcoin faucet, marking the return of Bitcoin faucets after 16 years. Jack Dorsey has already announced the faucet location "btc.day" on the X platform. It is reported that the total distribution pool is approximately $1 million worth of BTC (about 15 BTC), funded by the Bitcoin treasury of Jack Dorsey's Block company.

data.title: Michael Saylor: Bitcoin's Future Driven by Capital Flows
data.description: Michael Saylor stated in a social media post that Bitcoin has effectively triumphed, marking the end of the traditional four-year cycle theory. According to NS3.AI, Saylor emphasized that future Bitcoin price movements will primarily be influenced by capital flows. He also noted that banks and digital credit systems will play a significant role in shaping Bitcoin's growth.

data.title: Michael Saylor: A global consensus has been reached that "Bitcoin is digital capital".
data.description: Strategy founder Michael Saylor stated in an article on the X platform that a global consensus has emerged that Bitcoin is "digital capital," and the market structure is undergoing a fundamental transformation. He believes that the traditional "four-year cycle" is no longer applicable, and Bitcoin's price will be primarily driven by capital flows. Saylor also pointed out that the future banking system and digital credit will determine Bitcoin's growth path, while warning that the greatest risk comes from "medical-induced" protocol changes driven by flawed concepts, which could cause unnecessary interference and damage to the network.

data.title: Ripple's XRP Unlikely to Face Forced Sale Under Clarity Act
data.description: Ripple is not expected to encounter a mandatory sale of its 38.5 billion escrowed XRP under the Clarity Act. According to NS3.AI, the analysis suggests that XRP's classification as a digital commodity, rather than a security, is crucial. This classification would shift regulatory oversight to the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC).

data.title: U.S. Federal Agents Arrest Relatives of Deceased Iranian Commander
data.description: The U.S. Department of State announced on April 4 that federal agents arrested the niece and grandniece of the late Qasem Soleimani, a commander of Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Quds Force, in the United States on Friday. According to BlockBeats, the arrests were carried out by federal authorities, although further details regarding the charges or circumstances were not disclosed.

data.title: Relatives of Qassem Soleimani, commander of Iran's Quds Force, arrested in the United States
data.description: The U.S. State Department stated that the niece and grandniece of Qassem Soleimani, commander of the Quds Force of Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, were arrested in the United States on March 3 by federal law enforcement. U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has terminated their legal permanent resident status. (Jin Shi)

data.title: A suspected Bitmine address has added another 40,000 ETH, equivalent to approximately $82.07 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a suspected Bitmine address purchased another 40,000 ETH today through FalconX, equivalent to approximately $82.07 million.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 590 USDT with a Narrowed 0.50% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 04, 2026, 14:18 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 590 USDT and is now trading at 589.890015 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.50% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Trump issues another 48-hour ultimatum to Iran
data.description: US President Trump stated on social media: "Remember I gave Iran 10 days to reach a deal or reopen the Strait of Hormuz? Time is running out—in 48 hours, hell will befall them." (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump Sets 48-Hour Deadline for Iran on Strait of Hormuz Agreement
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a 48-hour ultimatum to Iran regarding a 10-day deadline. According to NS3.AI, Trump stated that Iran must either reach an agreement or reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The Strait is a crucial maritime passage for global oil shipments, and its closure could significantly impact international trade and energy markets. The situation remains tense as the deadline approaches, with potential implications for geopolitical stability and economic conditions.

data.title: SouthState Bank to Establish $1.5 Million Settlement Fund Following Data Breach
data.description: SouthState Bank has agreed to create a $1.5 million settlement fund for current and former customers impacted by a data breach that occurred on February 7, 2024. According to NS3.AI, eligible class members can claim up to $3,500 for documented losses. Claims must be submitted by June 15.
